01 — Who I Am

About Me

Hello, I'm Abinaya

A 21-year-old multi-talented creative artist from Sivaganga, Tamil Nadu. I bring passion, elegance, and expression to every frame I step into.

As a Shoot Model, I embody diverse aesthetics — from editorial fashion to commercial lifestyle shoots.

Beyond modeling, I express my artistry through Professional Dance and Singing, making me a truly versatile performing artist.
